config.name: microsoft_365_mgmt_api_logs-latest_transform
config.lua_code:
-- SentinelOne Parser: microsoft_365_mgmt_api_logs-latest 
-- OCSF Class: Security Finding (1001)
-- Performance Level: High-volume optimized
-- Generated: 2025-10-13T12:24:19.586252

-- Pre-compile patterns for performance
local DATETIME_PATTERN = "^%d%d%d%d%-%d%d%-%d%dT%d%d:%d%d:%d%d"
local UUID_PATTERN = "^[0-9a-fA-F%-]+$"

-- Cached references for better performance
local type = type
local pairs = pairs
local os_time = os.time
local string_match = string.match
local table_insert = table.insert

function transform(record)
    -- Input validation with early return
    if not record or type(record) ~= "table" then
        return nil, "Invalid input record"
    end

    -- Initialize OCSF-compliant output with pre-allocated tables
    local output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Security Finding",
        category_uid = 1, 
        category_name = "Security Events",
        metadata = {},
        entity_management = {},
        event = {},
        user = {},
        finding = {}
    }

    -- Optimized field mapping with type validation
    local function safe_copy(src_field, dest_table, dest_field, validator)
        local value = record[src_field]
        if value and (not validator or validator(value)) then
            dest_table[dest_field] = value
        end
    end

    -- DateTime field handling with validation
    local function process_datetime(value)
        if type(value) == "string" and string_match(value, DATETIME_PATTERN) then
            return value
        end
        return nil
    end

    -- Core field mappings with validation
    safe_copy("eventDateTime", output.entity_management, "time", process_datetime)
    safe_copy("userStates_logonDateTime", output.metadata, "logged_time_dt", process_datetime)
    safe_copy("category", output.event, "type")
    
    -- Process user states if present
    if record.userStates and type(record.userStates) == "table" then
        local user = output.user
        for _, state in pairs(record.userStates) do
            if type(state) == "table" then
                safe_copy("accountName", user, "name")
                safe_copy("domainName", user, "domain")
                safe_copy("logonIp", user, "logon_ip")
                safe_copy("userPrincipalName", user, "principle_name")
            end
        end
    end

    -- Process security findings
    if record.title then
        output.finding.title = record.title
        if record.riskScore and tonumber(record.riskScore) then
            output.finding.risk_score = tonumber(record.riskScore)
        end
    end

    -- Validation and enrichment
    local errors = {}
    if not output.entity_management.time then
        output.entity_management.time = os_time() * 1000
    end

    if not output.event.type then
        table_insert(errors, "Missing required field: event.type")
    end

    -- Return with validation results
    if #errors > 0 then
        return output, table.concat(errors, "; ")
    end

    return output
end

-- Error recovery function
local function recover_from_error(record, error_msg)
    local basic_output = {
        class_uid = 1001,
        class_name = "Security Finding",
        metadata = {
            error = error_msg,
            original_record = record
        },
        time = os_time() * 1000
    }
    return basic_output
end

-- Validation helper functions
local function validate_uuid(value)
    return type(value) == "string" and string_match(value, UUID_PATTERN)
end

local function validate_number(value)
    return type(value) == "number" or (type(value) == "string" and tonumber(value))
end
